Our Story

Passionate Pool Builders.
Queensland Made.

More than builders — we're creators of personal escapes. Family-owned, South Brisbane based, and driven by a genuine passion for exceptional outdoor living.

Who We Are

Old School Values,
New School Ideas

At Mediterranean Pools, we're passionate about turning dreams into reality. More than just pool builders, we see ourselves as creators of personal escapes — luxury sanctuaries designed with care, quality, and a deep understanding of our clients' lifestyles.

We're a local, family-owned business based in South Brisbane, serving the Brisbane metropolitan area and surrounding regions. Our foundation is built on old-school values: hard work, honesty, and a commitment to doing the job right.

Led by Brad — with over 30 years of hands-on experience — our team combines deep knowledge with modern innovation. Every pool we build reflects Brad's personal commitment to quality, precision, and pride in the craft.

30+

Years in the industry

200+

Pools completed

SEQ

South Brisbane based

What We Stand For

Our Core Values

These aren't marketing words. They're the principles Brad built this business on from day one.

Integrity

Doing the right thing — by our clients, our team, and our community. Honest advice, honest pricing, every time.

Craftsmanship

A relentless pursuit of quality in every detail — from the concrete shell to the last tile on the coping.

Collaboration

Your vision drives everything. We listen carefully, communicate clearly, and work alongside you from day one.

Reliability

We follow through on our promises. Timelines kept, updates given, work completed as agreed — no surprises.

The Mediterranean Pools Difference

A Process Built
Around You

Creating a pool is a significant investment — financially and emotionally. That's why we make the journey all about you — your vision, your lifestyle, your goals.

  • Collaborative, stress-free process from start to finish
  • Honest advice backed by decades of hands-on experience
  • Fully customised concrete pools and outdoor solutions
  • High-quality finishes and materials built to last
  • Transparent, itemised pricing — no hidden costs
  • A team who genuinely cares about getting it right
  • Local knowledge of Brisbane soil, climate & council rules

Start Your Journey

Ready to Create Your Perfect Pool?

Book a free, no-obligation consultation with Brad. We'll visit your site, listen to your vision, and create a custom plan just for you.
